title: Blueno Blocks the Path
description: Luffy reaches Blueno and CP9, turning the rescue into a direct challenge against the World Government’s assassins.
scene: Across pages 19, this part follows Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Sanji, Chopper. Luffy reaches Blueno and CP9, turning the rescue into a direct challenge against the World Government’s assassins.
summary: Luffy reaches Blueno and CP9, turning the rescue into a direct challenge against the World Government’s assassins.
